title: endocomia rufirachis
intro: Endocomia rufirachis is a species of plant in the family Lauraceae, native to Borneo, and is also known as the Borneo cinnamon. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Endocomia rufirachis include its potential to aid in reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the bark of the plant is typically dried and used as a spice, and it can also be found in traditional medicine blends and infusions.
